status: P0 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 1 / CRITICAL PRODUCT IDENTITY BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Unverified peptide hydrolysate / biologic mixture product family
mechanism_summary: No mechanism is assigned beyond the supplier’s claimed product category because composition, manufacturing process and active constituents are unresolved.
evidence_maturity: No branded-product clinical evidence may be assigned until analytical equivalence and manufacturing comparability are demonstrated.
regulatory_headline: CRITICAL IDENTITY AND MANUFACTURING GAP — NO MEDICINAL EQUIVALENCE CLAIM
certification_blockers: Sterility, endotoxin, viral and transmissible-agent controls
closure_class: CRITICAL BIOLOGICAL MIXTURE AND SOURCE COMPARABILITY
closure_state: BLOCKED — SOURCE TISSUE, HYDROLYSATE PROCESS AND COMPOSITION UNKNOWN
authoritative_product_boundary: Published Cerebrolysin evidence concerns a manufacturer-controlled porcine-brain protein hydrolysate preparation. It does not establish equivalence of an unbranded 60 mg vial or another cerebroprotein hydrolysate.
critical_closure_controls: No transfer from branded Cerebrolysin trials
No assumption that 60 mg describes a comparable active mixture
No stroke, dementia, brain-injury or cognitive-enhancement protocol
Biological-source and transmissible-agent controls remain mandatory
Human efficacy remains product and indication specific
